mapper.select:
SELECT CASE WHEN ROUND(AVG(COMMEND_YN)*100,1) > #{limitPer} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS VIEW_LIMIT_YN , ROUND(AVG(COMMEND_YN)*100,1) AS PERCENT FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW WHERE 1=1 AND STTUS_VAL = '1'
AND REQ_BUY_TYPE = #{reqBuyType}

SELECT /*RequestReview_Query.selectMypageReviewList 마이페이지 개통후기 리스트 */ REQUEST_KEY , CONTRACT_NUM , REQ_BUY_TYPE , MODEL_ID , PROD_ID , REVIEW_SBST , COMMEND_YN , EVENT_CD , SNS_INFO , NTF_YN , PRIZE_SBST , STTUS_VAL , RIP , SYS_RDATE , SYS_RDATE_DD , REG_NM , DECODE(REQ_BUY_TYPE,'UU','유심 후기','MM','휴대폰 후기','-') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM , PROD_DIV_CD , REQ_BUY_PROD_MSN , RATE_CD , HIT_CNT , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY HIT_CNT DESC) RANKING , ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3) AS baseDate , REVIEW_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW WHERE 1=1 AND STTUS_VAL = '1'
AND CONTRACT_NUM IN
#{item}
ORDER BY NTF_YN DESC, RANKING, SYS_RDATE DESC

SELECT REQUEST_KEY , REVIEW_ID , REQ_BUY_TYPE , MODEL_ID , PROD_ID , REVIEW_SBST , COMMEND_YN , EVENT_CD , SNS_INFO , NTF_YN , PRIZE_SBST , STTUS_VAL , SYS_RDATE_DD , RATE_CD , HIT_CNT FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW SET HIT_CNT = HIT_CNT + 1 WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT REQUEST_KEY , CONTRACT_NUM , REQ_BUY_TYPE , MODEL_ID , PROD_ID , REVIEW_SBST , COMMEND_YN , EVENT_CD , SNS_INFO , NTF_YN , PRIZE_SBST , STTUS_VAL , RIP , SYS_RDATE , SYS_RDATE_DD , REG_NM , PROD_DIV_CD , REQ_BUY_PROD_MSN , RATE_CD , HIT_CNT , DECODE(REQ_BUY_TYPE,'UU','유심 후기','MM','휴대폰 후기','-') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId}

SELECT /*RequestReviewMapper.selectReviewQuestionList 사용후기 질문 답변 리스트 */ A.QUESTION_DESC, A.QUESTION_MM, LISTAGG(D.ANSWER_DESC, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY D.ANSWER_DESC) AS ANSWER_DESC FROM MCP_REVIEW_QUESTION_BAS A ,( SELECT B.QUESTION_ID, B.ANSWER_DESC FROM MCP_REVIEW_QUESTION_DTL B , ( SELECT QUESTION_ID, ANSWER_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW_ANSWER WHERE 1=1 AND REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ) C WHERE 1=1 AND C.QUESTION_ID = B.QUESTION_ID AND C.ANSWER_ID = B.ANSWER_ID ) D WHERE 1=1 AND A.QUESTION_ID = D.QUESTION_ID GROUP BY A.QUESTION_DESC, A.QUESTION_MM, D.QUESTION_ID, A.INDC_ODRG ORDER BY A.INDC_ODRG

SELECT /*RequestReviewMapper.selectReviewQuestionList 사용후기 질문 답변 리스트 */ A.QUESTION_DESC, A.QUESTION_MM, LISTAGG(D.ANSWER_DESC, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY D.ANSWER_DESC) AS ANSWER_DESC FROM MCP_REVIEW_QUESTION_BAS A ,( SELECT B.QUESTION_ID, B.ANSWER_DESC FROM MCP_REVIEW_QUESTION_DTL B , ( SELECT QUESTION_ID, ANSWER_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW_ANSWER WHERE 1=1 AND REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND REVIEW_ID = #{reviewId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ) C WHERE 1=1 AND C.QUESTION_ID = B.QUESTION_ID AND C.ANSWER_ID = B.ANSWER_ID ) D WHERE 1=1 AND A.QUESTION_ID = D.QUESTION_ID GROUP BY A.QUESTION_DESC, A.QUESTION_MM, D.QUESTION_ID, A.INDC_ODRG ORDER BY A.INDC_ODRG
SELECT QUESTION_ID , QUESTION_MM FROM MCP_REVIEW_QUESTION_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND STAT_VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY INDC_ODRG

SELECT A.QUESTION_ID , A.QUESTION_DESC , B.ANSWER_DESC , B.ANSWER_ID , A.ANSWER_TYPE , A.AUTH_FLAG_YN FROM MCP_REVIEW_QUESTION_BAS A INNER JOIN MCP_REVIEW_QUESTION_DTL B ON A.QUESTION_ID = B.QUESTION_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) BETWEEN TO_DATE(A.QUESTION_START_DD,'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(A.QUESTION_END_DD,'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY A.INDC_ODRG,B.ANSWER_ID
SELECT A.USERID FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A INNER JOIN MCP_USER B ON A.USERID = B.USERID WHERE 1=1 AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO= #{contractNum}

SELECT /*RequestReviewMapper.selectBestReviewList 우수 개통후기 리스트 */ REQUEST_KEY , CONTRACT_NUM , REQ_BUY_TYPE , MODEL_ID , PROD_ID , REVIEW_SBST , COMMEND_YN , EVENT_CD , SNS_INFO , NTF_YN , PRIZE_SBST , STTUS_VAL , RIP , SYS_RDATE , SYS_RDATE_DD , REG_NM , PROD_DIV_CD , REQ_BUY_PROD_MSN , RATE_CD , DECODE(REQ_BUY_TYPE,'UU','유심 후기','MM','휴대폰 후기','-') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM , ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3) AS baseDate , REVIEW_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW WHERE 1=1 AND PRIZE_SBST IS NOT NULL AND NTF_YN = 1 ORDER BY PRIZE_SBST

SELECT REVIEW_ID , REQUEST_KEY FROM ( SELECT REVIEW_ID , REQUEST_KEY , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY REQUEST_KEY ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC) AS rn FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} ) WHERE rn = 1

SELECT /*RequestReview_Query.selectReviewList */ REVIEW_ID FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW WHERE 1=1
AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
AND SYS_RDATE > TO_DATE(#{strtDttm}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')
ORDER BY SYS_RDATE DESC
